states.name: Alira
states.title: Sweet Beach Temptation
states.description: "My sweet angel, I'm heeeeere! We made it to the island at last. At last. I thought that horrible boat trip would never end. All those storms, all those people packed so close together. It's a miracle I didn't lose any of my things! (Don't worry, I checked my bags as soon as we docked. All my swimsuits are safe and sound∼) Wish you were with me, cuddlebug!" Shortly after landing at their island resort, a Hymelian noble was horrified to find her jewelry box had vanished. Alira stole it for the war effort, of course. But surely the emperor will let her keep a piece or two for herself.

states.name: Alira
states.title: Sweet Beach Temptation
states.description:
"My most handsome darling,

Ugh. How gloomy everyone on this island is! Whenever I start to relax, someone has to bring up the invasion—or worse, the rebels. As soon as I get back, you owe me a kiss for each time I had to hear 'Blue Dragon Knights.' I'm warning you, it's a lot! ♡

Wish you were with me, pumpkin!"

In the middle of the night, resort guards arrested a wealthy merchant for treason. Supposedly, his secret correspondence with the Rigland resistance had been pinned to his door with knives. Alira usually prefers a more subtle approach, but this vacation put her in a more theatrical mood than usual.

states.name: Alira
states.title: Sweet Beach Temptation
states.description:
The emperor ordered her to send a coded letter each day she was away. Alira has faithfully carried out her duties as his spy, sowing fear of the Empire among Erden's most wealthy and elite. But there are some secrets she must keep even from her master.

Who knows why Fate would bring the man who killed her family here now? Who knows why She would make him untouchable, far too crucial to Bergaria's war to die at her hands? Who knows what cruel joke the world will play on her next?

She'll let the bastard live. For now. But he owes her a debt in blood, and one day, Alira will see it paid.
